title: K-Similar Strings
titleCn: 相似度为 K 的字符串

testcases.input: s1 = "ab", s2 = "ba" Output: 1 Explanation: The two string are 1-similar because we can use one swap to change s1 to s2: "ab" --> "ba".
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The two string are 1-similar because we can use one swap to change s1 to s2: "ab" --> "ba".

testcases.input: s1 = "abc", s2 = "bca" Output: 2 Explanation: The two strings are 2-similar because we can use two swaps to change s1 to s2: "abc" --> "bac" --> "bca".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The two strings are 2-similar because we can use two swaps to change s1 to s2: "abc" --> "bac" --> "bca".
